summary: Go-based test orchestration framework with agent-driven development, MCP handlers, schema validation, and a TUI interface using Bubbletea
concerns: high number of agent directories (42+) suggests iterative/generative development with potential duplication
fragmented test files across multiple agent directories may indicate unstable architecture
staged and untracked files suggest incomplete synchronization
rapid agent iteration (0041, 0042) may be accumulating technical debt
suggestions: consolidate agent directories into a cohesive test suite to reduce duplication
establish stable interfaces between runner, reporter, and schema packages before further extension
add integration tests that validate the full pipeline end-to-end
document the agent numbering convention and purpose for maintainability
review assertion wiring for consistency across test files
